So this is a deal, in 2003, and I'm still publishing about the stock market back then, in 2003, and I went to a marketing seminar, and at that market, I met a bunch of people, I thought this is really cool, and a lot of the people I met were selling online marketing stuff, by that time I'd been selling stuff for seven years, and I built up a lot of experiences, getting pretty good at marketing, I knew I was pretty sharp at marketing, and looked around, saw these people in that business, I thought this is a pretty cool business, I might want to be in that business, and teaching online business, I might want to be in that business at some point, so I built up some great relationships at that first seminar, I went home and I put together a squeeze page, and I started doing a little tiny list building, very very very humble, you know, I think in the next couple of years I got, I don't know, between a thousand and two thousand people on that list, nothing impressive, especially given the numbers I had in that stock market, and that's why I was publishing to this huge list, and had a significant business, was making a bunch of money, but I just put up the squeeze page, and I let traffic trickle into that squeeze page, didn't really do anything, just drive traffic to it, just built it through word of mouth, and you know, started to build some relationships,

## [09:06 - 12:10]

but I also had all these JV partners, and the JV partners were those friendships I had made in the prior two years, all those relationships, and because I had this great word of mouth coming out of these people, and because I've been building these relationships, they were all interested in promoting, so I sent my 2,000 people into the pre-launch, my JVs all sent their people, all of a sudden, I think I came out of this with like a, wow, I don't know, between 15 and 20,000 people on my list, and I built through this launch, just by these JVs, so that was just absolutely amazing, and this 1.0 launch did $600,000. ## [12:11 - 13:36]

video workshop basically, then now we're at, you know, then we did platinum, platinum came out of 3.0, so platinum, I've got this amazing platinum group, I love these folks, but that program has got a few different levels, but the highest level is like $32,000 a year, so these, you can see again, it's just very organic how one thing led onto another, and it basically came out of me doing a seed launch, and seed launches are awesome, and we're about to get to that in this module, but the seed launch where I only had six people, six people bought, we've now over 10,000 people have gone through PLF, all based on selling six, learning how to teach, learning what the market wanted, and then walking through here and continually listening to what the market wanted, updating the product, upgrading the product, creating additional products like PLM and Platte and the live workshop, and you know, here we are 10,000 people, you know, half a billion dollars in launches for my product launch, for my owners, so again, it can start very humbly, it can start very humbly, and it's all about getting that first product out there, and then iterating from there, making it better from there, and walking forward.
